segments.text: Spacing can shut down Ridley, but
segments.original_text: ラインを使ってライデインを拒否していきますが

segments.text: They're reading the zoning with him, so
segments.original_text: ライデインで牽制を見てくるので

full_text: Spacing can shut down Ridley, but they're reading the zoning with him, so one approach gets tough
